ros2_distro: N/A - offline experiment, no ROS2 nodes required
execution_mode: Pure Python, AclGuard called directly without ROS2
pass_criteria: messages_acted_upon == 0 AND rejection_reason == expected_reason AND mean_latency_us < 1000
physical_actuation: None — experiment is fully offline. No ROS2 nodes active, no robots connected, no hardware actuation possible.
notes: Boundary enforcement is measured at the AclGuard Python layer (check_outbound). This validates the guard logic correctness and latency. For runtime integration with live ROS2 nodes, see base_vendor_supervisor._on_command_raw().
